artifacts.summary: Research report analyzing parser extension requirements for first-order syntax including variables, functions, predicates, and quantifier binding
Supplementary research analyzing Logos Theory source code (Typst and Lean) for first-order syntax conventions, revealing that forall/exists do not bind variables - lambdas handle all variable binding
Revised 7-phase implementation plan for first-order parser extension, incorporating lambda-binding architecture where lambdas bind variables and quantifiers operate on lambdas
Implementation summary documenting all changes, verification results, and architecture notes

active_projects.completion_summary: Extended ModelChecker parser for first-order syntax with lambda-binding architecture. Implemented tokenize_first_order(), parse_term(), parse_first_order_expression() supporting variables, constants, functions, predicates, lambda abstractions/applications, and quantifiers. Integrated with Sentence class while maintaining full backward compatibility. Created 45 unit tests covering all syntactic forms.
